narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp C (precinct in Warren County) has 687 registered voters, with 42.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.6 percentage points.
